dct_title_s:
Carte Particuliere des Costes de l'Afrique depuis Cabo Ledo juſques au Cap de
          Bone Esperance. Levée par Ordre Expres des Roys de Portugal sous qui on en a fait la
          Decouvert
dct_alternative_sm: Specific map of the African coast from Cape Ledo to the Cape of Good Hope
dct_description_sm: The compass rose radiate rhumb lines. Inset: map of Saldanha Bay.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
